stemHtml: In preparation for a NAT HLA crossing from Shannon to Gander, you need to ensure the accuracy of the time-keeping device. According to NAT Doc 007, what is the mandatory pre-flight time procedure?

options.a: Note the local time at departure and convert to UTC mentally.
options.b: UTC time check and resynchronisation of the aircraft Master Clock (typically FMS).
options.c: Verify the FMS time against the aircraft's analogue standby clock.
options.d: Request current UTC from Oceanic ATC prior to entry.
